LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE. PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO THE SOLANO SUPERIOR COURT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. CAVALRY MUST PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. COUNSEL FOR THE CAVALRY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jan-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC's MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE.

Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC's motion to transfer venue to the Solano Superior Court is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Cavalry must pay all transfer costs.

Counsel for the Cavalry is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
